name: vps-metric-agent
description: Lightweight VPS metric agent with Bun plugin architecture

scripts.build:linux-x64: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64-modern --outfile dist/vps-metric-agent-linux-x64 src/index.ts
scripts.build:linux-arm64: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/vps-metric-agent-linux-arm64 src/index.ts
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/vps-metric-agent-darwin-arm64 src/index.ts
scripts.build:windows-x64: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target=bun-windows-x64-modern --outfile dist/vps-metric-agent-windows-x64.exe src/index.ts
scripts.build:all: bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64 && bun run build:darwin-arm64 && bun run build:windows-x64
